description_long: This object is a polygonal hammer with a distinctly geometric, octagonal head and a straight, rectangular handle. The head is large and blocky, lacking any visible claws or peen, suggesting a sledgehammer or mallet style. The handle is solid, straight, and extends from one side of the head, with no visible ergonomic shaping or grip enhancements. The entire object is a uniform dark color, with no visible markings, textures, or decorative elements. The surfaces appear matte and hard, with sharp edges and flat faces. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or attachments.
description: A blocky, octagonal-headed hammer with a straight, rectangular handle, all in a uniform dark color and matte finish.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from an angle showing both the octagonal head and the full length of the straight handle extending to the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top of the octagonal head and the handle projecting outward, emphasizing the head's geometric shape.
description_view_2: The hammer is viewed from the opposite side, showing the handle extending to the right and the head's flat top surface.
description_view_3: The handle is seen extending from the right side of the octagonal head, with the head's side and top faces visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, rectangular metal handle with a matte finish and no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Octagonal, blocky sledge-type head with flat striking faces and no claws or peen.
